---
name: 01.00.initialize-project
description: "Scaffold a Python project for a 5-floor, 4-elevator dispatch
agent: agent
model: GPT-5.5 (copilot)
---

# Meta-Prompt

To demonstrate GitHub Copilot for a group of developers, can you please provide a custom GitHub Copilot prompt I can use to initialize a Python based project to simulate an Elevator Dispatch system. Include a web UIs that shows both an elevator status dashboard along with animation to simulate live elevator movement and little circles representing passengers. This elevator system is for a 5 story building that has 4 elevators, so also represent the building, floors and elevators graphically in the UI. For the structure of this initial custom prompt, please reference the guidance provided at: https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/prompt-files.
